notes: Comments identity/open-state core remains unchanged from accepted CC7.5.6.
Buttons manager remains unchanged from accepted CC7.5.16.
Gifts keep the CC7.5.17 manager algorithm: detect existing gifts after post selection, add/edit/delete, multiple gifts through gifts_json.
Fix: after admin sends gift title or gift content, previous gift step menus are explicitly neutralized and deleted so menus should not multiply.
Fix: when gift content is a typed URL, the URL is stored and shown as the gift; MAX link-preview attachments are ignored for this case.
Photo/file gifts still store as MAX attachments; text gifts store as text.
Post patcher remains DB-V3-POST-PATCHER-1.3-MULTI-GIFTS-PRESERVE and rebuilds comments + buttons + all gift rows together.
No overlay, no floating hints, no public/app.js override, no external code.run /app comments button.
Audit: still layered through 7510-7518 wrappers. After acceptance, merge admin flows into one clean core module.
